expectations.text: Uses semantic containers (database, queue) at the leaf level — not generic [box] for the datastore and the queue
expectations.evidence: semantic containers database + queue at leaf level

expectations.text: At least one interface is declared (lollipop () or 'interface' keyword) — diagrams that show only components and lines are component-diagrams-in-name-only
Components are grouped via package or node (logical or physical grouping)
